tool_args.label: 23rd Street Bus Lanes
tool_args.raw_text: Westbound bus lanes: 1st Ave - 8th Ave. Eastbound bus lanes: 10th Ave - 2nd Ave. Bus lanes in effect 24/7 except westbound between 7th and 8th Ave.

payload.description: Westbound bus lanes from 1st Ave to 8th Ave, eastbound bus lanes from 10th Ave to 2nd Ave on 23rd Street.

tool_args.label: 23rd Street Turn Restrictions
tool_args.raw_text: 23rd Street Turn Restrictions: Existing: LT-WB 9th Ave, LT-WB 7th Ave, LT-EB 6th Ave, LT-WB 5th Ave, LT-EB/WB Park Ave S. NEW: LT-EB 8th Ave, LT-Lexington Ave, LT-Broadway, RT-6 Ave.

payload.description: Existing and new turn restrictions on 23rd Street. Existing: LT-WB 9th Ave, LT-WB 7th Ave, LT-EB 6th Ave, LT-WB 5th Ave, LT-EB/WB Park Ave S. New: LT-EB 8th Ave, LT-Lexington Ave, LT-Broadway, RT-6 Ave.

tool_args.label: Remove Westbound 5th Avenue Stop
tool_args.raw_text: Remove Westbound 5 Av Stop. Existing stops only 400' apart, on either side of plaza - less than local stop spacing guidelines.

payload.description: Remove westbound 5th Avenue stop on 23rd Street. Existing stops only 400' apart on either side of plaza, less than local stop spacing guidelines.

tool_args.label: Remove Lexington Avenue Stop
tool_args.raw_text: Remove Lexington Ave Stop. Lexington Ave offers no bus or subway connection. Significantly lower ridership. 500' to Park Ave and 3rd Ave. Planned construction will force stop to be revoked.

payload.description: Remove Lexington Avenue stop on 23rd Street. Lexington Ave offers no bus or subway connection. Significantly lower ridership than adjacent stops at 3rd Ave and Park Ave S. Lexington Ave is 500' to Park Ave and 3rd Ave - less than local stop spacing guidelines. Planned construction will force stop to be revoked for extended period.

tool_args.label: 20th Street Stop Adjustments
tool_args.raw_text: 20th Street Stops: 20th St Loop stop will remain in service. Adjusting 20th Street Loop stop closer to crosswalk. 1st Ave stop may be pulled away from intersection for optimal fare machine installation.

payload.description: 20th St Loop stop will remain in service. Adjusting 20th Street Loop stop closer to crosswalk to improve customer access. 1st Ave stop may be pulled away from intersection to accommodate optimal fare machine installation.

tool_args.label: Move Eastbound 1st Avenue Stop to Farside
tool_args.raw_text: Move Eastbound 1st Ave to Farside. Relocate eastbound M23 SBS 1st Ave stop to the farside (eastern) of 23rd St at 1st Ave.

payload.description: Relocate eastbound M23 SBS 1st Ave stop to the farside (eastern) of 23rd St at 1st Ave. Offers closer connection to VA Hospital, Peter Cooper Village and transfers to M15.

tool_args.label: Move Eastbound 2nd Avenue Stop to Farside
tool_args.raw_text: Move Eastbound 2nd Ave to Farside. Relocate eastbound M23 SBS 2nd Ave stop to the farside (eastern) of 23rd St at 2nd Ave.

payload.description: Relocate eastbound M23 SBS 2nd Ave stop to the farside (eastern) of 23rd St at 2nd Ave. Improves bus speeds at eastern end of route. Separates crosstown and express bus stops.

tool_args.label: Real Time Passenger Information Signs
tool_args.raw_text: Real Time Passenger Information Signs. Community Board Six Signs: WB 20th St/1st Ave, WB 1st Avenue, WB 2nd Avenue, WB 3rd Avenue.

payload.description: Real Time Passenger Information Signs for Community Board Six area: WB 20th St/1st Ave, WB 1st Avenue, WB 2nd Avenue, WB 3rd Avenue.
